import React, { useState } from 'react'; import useScrollReveal from '../components/useScrollReveal'; import './Contact.css'; export default function Contact() { const ref = useScrollReveal(); const [form, setForm] = useState({ name: '', email: '', company: '', service: '', message: '' }); const [sent, setSent] = useState(false); const handleChange = e => setForm(f => ({ ...f, [e.target.name]: e.target.value })); const handleSubmit = e => { e.preventDefault(); setSent(true); setForm({ name: '', email: '', company: '', service: '', message: '' }); }; return (
